items.title: Text to class posterior
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  doc["document text"] --> tok["tokenize + vocabulary"]
  tok --> feat["count or binary features"]
  feat --> like["per-word class likelihoods"]
  like --> score["log P(y) + sum log P(x_i|y)"]
  score --> pred["argmax class label"]
items.caption: Both variants vectorize text, score each class under naive Bayes, and pick the highest posterior.

items.title: Multinomial vs Bernoulli features
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  w["word: free"] --> m["Multinomial: count = 3"]
  w --> b["Bernoulli: present = 1"]
  m --> ml["score += 3 * log theta_y,free"]
  b --> bl["score += log theta_y,free + log(1-theta) for absent words"]
items.caption: Multinomial NB weights repetition; Bernoulli NB collapses any positive count to 1 and penalizes absence.
